instruction: Open your browser and go to the official Visual Studio Code website at code.visualstudio.com.
Click the 'Download for Windows' button. The installer file (.exe) will begin downloading automatically.
Once downloaded, double-click the installer file to launch the setup wizard.
Accept the license agreement, choose your install location, and click 'Next' through the setup options.
Click 'Install' and wait for the process to complete, then click 'Finish' to launch VS Code.
Visit figma.com/downloads and click 'Download' under the Desktop App section.
Run the downloaded installer and follow the on-screen setup prompts.
Once installed, open Figma and sign in with your Figma account or create a new one.
Go to discord.com/download and click 'Download for Windows'.
Run the downloaded 'DiscordSetup.exe' file. Discord installs automatically with no configuration screens.
Discord will launch automatically after installation. Log in or create an account to start using it.
